output.setting: Abandoned Neon-lit Manufacturing Sector in Sector 7

pickup.name: EMP Battery Module
pickup.effect: Temporarily disables mechanical armor

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone activates the freight elevator to the Assembly Floor

enemy.name: Security Sentinel
enemy.weakness: EMP Battery Module (Stuns the sentinel's targeting optics)

pickup.name: Cryo-Gel Canister
pickup.effect: Slows thermal-based enemies and brittle armor

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel unlocks the biometric door to the Server Core

enemy.name: Rogue Combat Synth
enemy.weakness: Cryo-Gel Canister (Hardens internal hydraulics, causing lockup)

pickup.name: Overclocked Logic Chip
pickup.effect: Bypasses boss shield generators

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the synth alerts the mainframe, opening the path to the Core

boss.name: Mainframe Overseer Unit
boss.weakness: Overclocked Logic Chip (Disables the primary shield layer)
boss.victory_condition: Hack the terminal while the shield is down

output.objective: Infiltrate the core and upload the virus to cripple the mega-corporation's network

output.setting: A crumbling, rain-slicked mega-slum in Neo-Kowloon, filled with flickering neon and sparks from exposed wiring

enemy.name: Corpo-Security Drone
enemy.weakness: Monofilament Edge Katana (precision strike to rotors)

encounters.hazard: High-voltage exposed cable arching across the floor

pickup.name: EMP Grenade
pickup.effect: Disables synthetic shielding on robotic enemies for 10 seconds

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone activates the security gate leading to the mainframe

pickup.name: Neural Overclock Stim
pickup.effect: Triples attack speed for 5 seconds

encounters.trigger: Neutralizing the enforcer triggers an automated facility lockdown, opening the path to the inner sanctum

encounters.hazard: Shifting holographic platforms that fall away

pickup.name: Access Code Fragment
pickup.effect: Used to override the boss's defensive mainframe interface

encounters.trigger: Defeating the assassin shuts down the lockdown and summons the Boss

boss.name: Architect Vex
boss.victory_condition: Input the Access Code Fragment to disable Vex's armor before delivering the final strike

output.objective: Infiltrate the mega-slum and execute Architect Vex before the city grid resets

enemy.name: Glitch-Husk Sentry
enemy.weakness: Direct impact from the Fractal Resonance Wrench

pickup.name: Overclocked Logic Board
pickup.effect: Increases hacking speed and reveals enemy structural flaws

encounters.trigger: After defeating the sentry, the security bulkhead opens, leading to the server farm

enemy.name: Phase-Shift Assassin
enemy.weakness: The Overclocked Logic Board's signal interference

pickup.name: Cryo-Resonance Canister
pickup.effect: Allows the wrench to deal freeze damage

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the assassin causes a localized EMP, disabling the door to the core

enemy.name: Security Mainframe Golem
enemy.weakness: The Cryo-Resonance Canister to shatter its thermal shielding

pickup.name: Omni-Key Fragment
pickup.effect: Access key required to unlock the final boss chamber

encounters.trigger: Using the Omni-Key Fragment on the master console alerts the boss to your presence

boss.name: Neuro-Sync Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Successfully stabilize the core by draining the Overlord's memory banks

output.objective: Retrieve the lost consciousness logs of the city architect

output.setting: A decaying, rain-slicked megastructure district shrouded in eternal twilight.

encounters.hazard: Flickering high-voltage cables dangling in standing water.

pickup.name: Stasis Battery
pickup.effect: Slows time in a localized field to freeze mechanical components.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the scavenger unlocks the blast door leading to the central mainframe core.

pickup.name: Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Unlocks the command deck bridge.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the turret causes the security shutters to retract, revealing the path to the executive elevator.

encounters.hazard: Gravity anomalies shifting the floor angle.

pickup.name: Chronos Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Stabilizes temporal distortion.

encounters.trigger: Bypassing the enforcer triggers the alarm, opening the final vault door to the boss arena.

boss.name: The Architect of Shadows
boss.victory_condition: Use the fragment to stabilize the boss's phasing form, leaving them vulnerable to a final strike.

output.objective: Infiltrate the megastructure and neutralize the rogue AI architect before it deletes the district's temporal history.
output.reward: Access to advanced chronomancy abilities and a full restoration of the local timeline.

pickup.name: Cryo-Freeze Catalyst
pickup.effect: Freezes target for 3 seconds

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone activates the emergency mag-lock, forcing the door to the Data Core.

pickup.name: Molecular Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to hazard damage

encounters.trigger: The Ghoul's collapse triggers a lockdown protocol, requiring the player to hack the server mainframe to proceed.

pickup.name: Neural Overdrive Serum
pickup.effect: Doubles attack speed

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Assassin overrides the facility's main terminal, unlocking the path to the CEO's office for the final confrontation.

boss.name: The Architect
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Architect with the serum before the facility self-destructs

output.objective: Infiltrate the Bio-Synthesis Lab and retrieve the master code from the Architect to shut down the rogue AI.
output.reward: Prototype Alchemist Gauntlet and Access to the High-Tech Black Market

output.setting: A decaying, rain-slicked mega-slum on the edge of the neon sprawl where the power grid has failed.

enemy.name: Augmented Scrapper
enemy.weakness: Direct precision strikes with the Monofilament Dagger

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage cabling sparking across the puddles

pickup.name: EMP Grenade Component
pickup.effect: Temporarily disables cybernetic shielding

encounters.trigger: Killing the Scrapper causes a backup generator to vent, exposing the path to the Sector 4 Control Hub.

encounters.hazard: Automated sentry turrets that fire in rhythmic intervals

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Melts through heavy blast door plating

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers a lockdown alarm, forcing the player to the roof access point where the Boss awaits.

enemy.name: Corrupted Corporate Enforcer
enemy.weakness: Dagger strikes to the joints weakened by Corrosive Acid Vial

encounters.hazard: Strong winds threatening to blow the player off the precarious platform

pickup.name: Access Keycard
pickup.effect: Overrides the boss chamber's final firewall

encounters.trigger: The Enforcer falls, dropping the Access Keycard required to enter the Boss Arena.

boss.name: System Administrator Prime
boss.weakness: Overloading the internal logic core using the EMP Grenade Component from the first encounter
boss.victory_condition: Successfully override the terminal while avoiding the Administrator's digital onslaught.

output.objective: Infiltrate the broadcasting tower and transmit the kill-switch code to disable the city's corrupt security AI.
output.reward: The 'Phantom Protocol' stealth implant and 50,000 Credits.

output.setting: The Neon Neon-Noodle District, a floating market where the signs have mood swings

pickup.name: Super-Conductive Chopsticks
pickup.effect: Increases electricity conductivity for next encounter

encounters.trigger: Defeating the toaster opens the back alley door leading to the data server farm

pickup.name: Glitter-Bomb Software Patch
pickup.effect: Causes heavy lag to mechanical bosses

encounters.trigger: Capturing the hologram cat reveals the secret ladder to the penthouse rooftop

pickup.name: Golden Circuitry Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss chamber containment field

encounters.trigger: Destroying the disco drone initiates the final sequence and powers down the security grid

boss.name: The Great Neon Buddha Server
boss.victory_condition: Use the key to reset the server's sense of humor

output.objective: Restore laughter to the city by rebooting the main server
output.reward: A lifetime supply of instant ramen and infinite cloud storage

output.setting: A high-altitude, neon-lit rooftop botanical sanctuary in Neo-Kyoto where holographic cherry blossoms drift through synthetic air.

encounters.hazard: Flickering holographic koi that disrupt movement

pickup.name: Magnetic Sand Pouch
pickup.effect: Increases geomancy control

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone stabilizes the pool, unlocking the path to the Meditation Plaza.

pickup.name: Ancient Data Crystal
pickup.effect: Reveals structural weaknesses in armor

encounters.trigger: Purifying the monk reveals a hidden staircase to the Data Spire.

encounters.hazard: Shifting floor tiles that require timing

pickup.name: Stabilizer Module
pickup.effect: Prevents boss from using earth-based attacks

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel initiates the final sequence at the Zenith Core.

boss.name: The Architect AI
boss.victory_condition: Use the Stabilizer Module to tether the AI to the physical plane, then shatter its core with the Obsidian Seismic Staff.

output.objective: Restore harmony to the sanctuary by purifying the Architect AI's corrupted source code.
output.reward: The 'Geomancer's Digital Lotus' relic, which grants permanent earth-elemental aura.
